CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "Zones" (
	"ID" INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	"Name" VARCHAR(255),
	"Active" BOOLEAN,
	PRIMARY KEY("ID")
);




CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "Containers" (
	"ID" INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	"ZoneID" INTEGER,
	PRIMARY KEY("ID")
);




CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "Sensors" (
	"ID" INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	"ContainerID" INTEGER,
	"Code" VARCHAR(255),
	"Connected" BOOLEAN,
	"Type" VARCHAR(255),
	"LastUpdate" DATE,
	PRIMARY KEY("ID")
);




CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "PlantsType" (
	"ID" INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	"Name" VARCHAR(255),
	"Category" VARCHAR(255),
	"WaterVolume" VARCHAR(255),
	PRIMARY KEY("ID")
);




CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "Schedules" (
	"ID" INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	"PlantID" INTEGER,
	"Type" VARCHAR(255),
	"Active" BOOLEAN,
	"Intrval" VARCHAR(255),
	"NegativeTemp" BOOLEAN,
	"AWH" BOOLEAN,
	"LastWatering" DATE,
	"NextWatering" DATE,
	PRIMARY KEY("ID")
);




CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "Plants" (
	"ID" INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	"ContainerID" INTEGER,
	"TypeID" INTEGER,
	"Name" VARCHAR(255),
	"Active" BOOLEAN,
	PRIMARY KEY("ID")
);




CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "WateringLog" (
	"ID" INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	"ContainerID" INTEGER,
	"PlantID" INTEGER,
	"WaterValume" VARCHAR(255),
	"WateringType" VARCHAR(255),
	"Success" BOOLEAN,
	PRIMARY KEY("ID")
);




CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ErrorLog" (
	"ID" INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	"PlantID" INTEGER,
	"ContainerID" INTEGER,
	"SensorID" INTEGER,
	"Time" TIME,
	"ErrorType" VARCHAR(255),
	"Text" VARCHAR(255),
	PRIMARY KEY("ID")
);



ALTER TABLE "Zones"
ADD FOREIGN KEY("ID") REFERENCES "Containers"("ZoneID")
ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
ALTER TABLE "Containers"
ADD FOREIGN KEY("ID") REFERENCES "Sensors"("ContainerID")
ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
ALTER TABLE "PlantsType"
ADD FOREIGN KEY("ID") REFERENCES "Plants"("TypeID")
ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
ALTER TABLE "Plants"
ADD FOREIGN KEY("ID") REFERENCES "Schedules"("PlantID")
ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
ALTER TABLE "Containers"
ADD FOREIGN KEY("ID") REFERENCES "Plants"("ContainerID")
ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
ALTER TABLE "Containers"
ADD FOREIGN KEY("ID") REFERENCES "WateringLog"("ContainerID")
ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
ALTER TABLE "Plants"
ADD FOREIGN KEY("ID") REFERENCES "WateringLog"("PlantID")
ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
ALTER TABLE "Plants"
ADD FOREIGN KEY("ID") REFERENCES "ErrorLog"("PlantID")
ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
ALTER TABLE "Containers"
ADD FOREIGN KEY("ID") REFERENCES "ErrorLog"("ContainerID")
ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
ALTER TABLE "Sensors"
ADD FOREIGN KEY("ID") REFERENCES "ErrorLog"("SensorID")
ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
